_comment: Hero configuration. id must match HEROES constant (0=Dummy, 1=Sven, 2=Tamerlane, 3=FatherCallas, 4=Selene). weaponId matches WEAPON_IDS (0=AssaultRifle, 1=SMG, 2=Shotgun, 3=PumpShotgun, 4=MachinePistol). moveSpeedMult is optional; defaults to 1.0.

0.name: Dummy
0.description: A placeholder hero for development and testing. No special abilities.

1.name: Sven
1.description: A shadow wizard who catches enemies off guard with lightning and teleportation.

ability1.name: Shadow Lightning
ability1.description: Casts 3 thunderbolts in front of Sven at increasing distances, dealing damage in an area.

ultimate.name: Shadow Storm
ultimate.description: Emit massive dark electricity in a large area dealing huge damage for 10 seconds.

2.name: Tamerlane
2.description: A relentless vigilante who controls space with grenades and sheer resilience.

ability1.name: Shock Grenade
ability1.description: Throws a grenade that explodes after 2 seconds, damaging and slowing enemies in an area.

ability2.name: Willpower
ability2.description: Gain a temporary shield that absorbs damage for 5 seconds.

ultimate.name: Cluster Strike
ultimate.description: Call in an airstrike that drops multiple bombs in a large area dealing massive damage.

3.name: Father Callas
3.description: An evil tank priest who steals life, shrugs off punishment, and exiles enemies to a nightmare dimension.
3.quote: Naive men pray to the gods, they will learn to pray to me.

ability1.name: Siphon Life
ability1.description: Steal health from enemies in a cone in front of you, healing for 30% of the damage dealt.

ability2.name: Iron Stand
ability2.description: Become immune to damage for 5 seconds but cannot move or attack. Afterwards, 20% of all damage received is converted to shield for 10 seconds.

ultimate.name: Shadow Realm Banish
ultimate.description: Banish the nearest enemy to the Shadow Realm for 6 seconds – they are immune but cannot act. On return, they take 40 damage.

4.name: Selene
4.description: A swift moon-girl assassin who dashes through enemies, soars above the battlefield, and silences whole teams with a devastating lunar blast.

ability1.name: Crystal Smash
ability1.description: Dash forward and collide with an enemy, dealing 55 damage and briefly stunning them. If the kill shot, a crystal shard drops granting +20 HP to whoever collects it.

ability2.name: Astral Elevation
ability2.description: Jump into the air becoming untargetable for 2 s, then fly for 6 s with enhanced speed. On landing, gain +50 % weapon damage for 3 s.

ultimate.name: Lunar Eclipse
ultimate.description: Leap skyward and become untargetable, then unleash a powerful lunar blast dealing 80 damage and silencing all enemies hit for 4 s.

5.name: Fat Jerome
5.description: A stinky and greedy comic relief villain with a big belly and a love for garbage food and money.

ability1.name: Shoulder Charge
ability1.description: Charges forward, knocking back and damaging enemies in his path. Can steer left and right while charging.

ability2.name: Butt Smash
ability2.description: Jumps into the air and slams down, dealing damage in a small area. Enemies right next to him take more damage and are stunned briefly.

ultimate.name: Fatal Flatulence
ultimate.description: Start farting every second releasing a fart cloud that deals non-lethal damage and slows enemies in the area. Lasts 10 seconds.

6.name: Kyoukan
6.description: A precision sniper who keeps allies alive and leads pushes with tempo buffs.

ability1.name: Arrow of Gratitude
ability1.description: Heal an ally for 20% of their max health. Hold middle mouse to self-cast.

ability2.name: Engaging Leap
ability2.description: Leap powerfully upward and forward toward your aim direction.

ultimate.name: Inspiring Aura
ultimate.description: For 10 seconds, pulse armor and ultimate cooldown reduction to yourself and nearby allies every second.

7.name: Templar
7.description: A holy knight who protects allies with a healing rite and a flask of holy water, culminating in a powerful shockwave that stuns enemies.

ability1.name: Healing Boon
ability1.description: Heal an ally for 10 HP every second for 10 seconds. Can self-cast but not cast on others while self-casting.

ability2.name: Holy Water
ability2.description: Throw a flask of holy water that shatters on impact, healing allies and damaging enemies in an area.

ultimate.name: Hammer Of Justice
ultimate.description: Strikes a hammer on the ground, creating a shockwave that damages enemies and stuns them for 3 seconds.
